Story Text (Testu Istória)

const stories = [ { id: "student-story", level: "A1", titleEn: "The New Student", titleTl: "Estudante Foun", desc: "A warm story about Mario welcoming Ana, a new student from Baucau, to her first day of class.", meta: "Grade 8 Unit 1 Story — CEFR A1 Standard", illustration: ` `, segments: [ { en: "It is morning. Mario is at school. He is happy.", tl: "Dadeer ona. Mário iha eskola. Nia kontente." }, { en: "He sees a new student.", tl: "Nia haree estudante foun ida." }, { en: "\"Good morning,\" says Mario. \"I am Mario. What is your name?\"", tl: "\"Dadeer di'ak,\" Mário hatete. \"Ha'u Mário. Ó-nia naran saida?\"" }, { en: "\"Good morning,\" she says. \"My name is Ana. I am from Baucau.\"", tl: "\"Dadeer di'ak,\" nia hatete. \"Ha'u-nia naran Ana. Ha'u hosi Baukau.\"" }, { en: "Mario smiles. \"Nice to meet you, Ana.\"", tl: "Mário hamnasa. \"Kontente hasoru ó, Ana.\"" }, { en: "Ana opens her backpack. \"Oh no!\" she says. \"I have a notebook. But I do not have a pen.\"", tl: "Ana loke ninia pasta. \"Oh lae!\" nia hatete. \"Ha'u iha kadernu ida. Maibé ha'u la iha lapizeira.\"" }, { en: "Mario gives Ana a pen. \"Here,\" he says. \"We help each other.\"", tl: "Mário fó lapizeira ida ba Ana. \"Ne'e,\" nia hatete. \"Ita tulun malu.\"" }, { en: "\"Thank you!\" says Ana.", tl: "\"Obrigada!\" Ana hatete." } ], exercises: [ { type: "multiple", question: "1. Where is Ana from?", options: ["Same", "Baucau", "Bobonaro", "Oecusse"], correct: 1 }, { type: "multiple", question: "2. What is missing in Ana's backpack?", options: ["A notebook", "A ruler", "A pen", "A map"], correct: 2 }, { type: "write", question: "3. Complete the sentence: \"We ______ each other.\"", correct: "help" } ] }, { id: "ant-grasshopper-story", level: "A2", titleEn: "Sister Ant and Brother Grasshopper", titleTl: "Mana Nehek no Maun Gafañotu", desc: "Explore contrast markers and vocabulary related to planning, season transitions, and resource sharing.", meta: "Grade 8 Unit 3 Story — CEFR A2 Standard", imageSrc: "assets/Story-SisterAunt-1.webp", illustration: ` `, segments: [ { en: "One day, in the hot sun, Sister Ant is working very hard.", tl: "Loron ida, iha loro-manas okos, Mana Nehek badinas tebes." }, { en: "She is carrying a big piece of corn on her back.", tl: "Nia lori batar pedasu boot ida iha ninia kotuk." }, { en: "Brother Grasshopper is sitting under a banana tree, playing his guitar and singing.", tl: "Maun Gafañotu tuur hela iha hudi-hun okos, toca gitara no hananu." }, { en: "He laughs at Sister Ant and says, \"The rain is far away. Come and play!\"", tl: "Nia hamnasa Mana Nehek no hatete, \"Udan sei dook. Mai halimar!\"" }, { en: "But Sister Ant is collecting food for the wet season. You should work, too.", tl: "Lae, ha'u halibur hahán ba tempu-udan. Ó mós tenke serbisu." }, { en: "Soon, the weather changes, and the wet season arrives.", tl: "Lakleur, klima troka, no tempu-udan to'o mai." }, { en: "Sister Ant is kind and shares her food with him.", tl: "Mana Nehek laran-di'ak no fahe ninia hahán ho nia." } ], exercises: [ { type: "multiple", question: "1. What is Sister Ant carrying?", options: ["A banana", "A piece of corn", "A guitar", "A leaf"], correct: 1 }, { type: "multiple", question: "2. What did Brother Grasshopper do during the hot season?", options: ["Work hard", "Sleep all day", "Play his guitar and sing", "Build a home"], correct: 2 }, { type: "write", question: "3. Who shared food when the wet season arrived?", correct: "Sister Ant" } ] }, { id: "tom-lost-story", // ... existing code ... function openStory(id) { const story = stories.find(s => s.id === id); if (!story) return; currentStory = story; // Populate reader details document.getElementById('reader-meta').innerText = story.meta; document.getElementById('reader-title-en').innerText = story.titleEn; document.getElementById('reader-title-tl').innerText = story.titleTl; // Check if there is an optimized imageSrc WebP asset; otherwise, fall back to inline SVG const illustrationContainer = document.getElementById('reader-illustration'); if (story.imageSrc) { illustrationContainer.innerHTML = ` `; } else { illustrationContainer.innerHTML = story.illustration; } renderSegments(); renderExercises(); navigate('reader'); showToast("Story Opened! (Istória Loke ona!)", "Enjoy reading this story bilingually or segment-by-segment."); } function renderSegments() { // ... existing code ...
